name: Mpets Nursing Bottle
shortDescription: When A Pet Is Sick, Please Use a Separate Nipple, To Avoid Cross Infection. Before And After Using This Product, Please Wash the Bottle and Nipple with Warm Water Thoroughly. Please Do Not Use the Product for Other Purpose Expect Feeding Pets.
description: This nursing kit includes 1 bottle, 5 teats & 1 bottle brush. HOW TO BOTTLE FEED A KITTEN Set the kitten on his stomach, never try to feed a kitten on its back. Hold his head gently with one hand to encourage the kitten to latch onto the nipple. use your other hand to guide the kitten's mouth to the nipple. Never force a kitten onto a nipple. The kitten's tongue should form a V-shape to facilitate sucking. By holding the head of the kitten, you will be able to feel if he is swallowing the milk. When A Pet Is Sick, Please Use a Separate Nipple, To Avoid Cross Infection. Before And After Using This Product, Please Wash the Bottle and Nipple with Warm Water Thoroughly. Please Do Not Use the Product for Other Purpose Expect Feeding Pets. Benefits of Nursing Bottle Set for Kittens and Puppies Small and handy for easy feeding. 5 replaceable nipples for pets of all sizes. Bottle is marked in scale for measuring the liquid food. Bottle brush for cleaning the bottle.
